title: CPVP + PVP pack
description: This is a texture pack that will help with PVP and crystal PVP
body:
1 changes sword textures
2 changes obsidian textures
3 changes end crystal textures
4 changes wool textures
5 changes heart textures
6 changes survival UI textures
7 changes axe textures
8 changes powder snow textures
9 changes breaking animation
10 changes respawn anchor & glowstone texture
